summary: Completed testing of Crypto Bag Tracker MVP Fixes - Iteration 15. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified exchange deposit warning, Chain of Custody modal, and Import CSV functionality.

per_asset_fifo.details: Multi-asset CSV import works correctly. Each asset's gains calculated independently (BTC buys match BTC sells only). Total gains are reasonable, not billions.

exchange_deposit_detection.details: Analyzing Solana wallet 7UcUr26v8a7ttMTud3NeARj8nFqDa2upsGyAKHLcWhEr shows exchange_deposit_warning.detected=true with amber warning message in UI

exchange_deposit_warning_ui.details: Frontend shows amber 'Exchange Deposit Address Detected' warning with 'Import Exchange CSV' and 'Connect Exchange API' action buttons

coinbase_sync_endpoint.details: POST /api/exchanges/sync-coinbase returns 400 error with proper message when no Coinbase connection exists

form_8949_asset_names.details: Form 8949 export shows correct per-asset names (BTC, ETH) in CSV

csv_import_gains.details: CSV import with multi-asset transactions produces reasonable gains, not billions

wallet_only_zero_balance.details: After clearing exchange data, wallet-only analysis shows 0 SOL balance for the Solana exchange deposit address

seed_data_creation: Multi-asset CSV test data with BTC, ETH, SOL, DOGE, ALGO transactions
context_for_next_testing_agent: All MVP fixes for Iteration 15 are working: 1) Per-asset FIFO calculation, 2) Exchange deposit address detection with warning UI, 3) Coinbase sync endpoint returns proper error when no connection. Test user mobiletest@test.com with UNLIMITED tier can be used. Exchange deposit warning shows for Solana wallet 7UcUr26v8a7ttMTud3NeARj8nFqDa2upsGyAKHLcWhEr.
